name: CTA Section
description: Call-to-action section with headline, supporting text, and action buttons. Supports standard and dramatic brand variants.

standard.description: Centered CTA with headline, description, and action buttons.

slots.headline: Primary heading to drive user action
slots.description: Supporting text that reinforces the CTA message
slots.cta-group: One or more action buttons, typically primary + secondary

brand.description: Full-width dramatic CTA with mesh background, large gradient heading, and landmark spacing.

slots.cta-group: Dual CTA buttons, primary with aura-glow
